name: @pdfme/generator

en.when_to_use: Use it for bulk products from one fixed layout (the same certificate filled with 100 names, shipping labels, tickets, invoices): one JSON template defines each field's coordinates, and one inputs dataset produces pixel-aligned PDFs. For one-off free layout use pdf-lib/jspdf; to modify an existing PDF form use pdf-lib.
en.why_valuable: A declarative template (each field's xywh coordinates and type) separates layout from data, fitting this project's "AI assembles data -> mount" model. For certificates, badges, and labels with fixed layouts, having native AI calculate coordinates through jspdf is both expensive and misaligned.

data_in.note: template.schemas is a two-dimensional array (pages x fields); inputs is an array of records where each record maps schema.name to a value, and record count equals the number of generated copies. generator includes text/checkbox/radioGroup without plugins; image/qrcode/barcode/table/line and others require plugins from @pdfme/schemas at call time or it throws 'Plugin or renderer for type X not found'. Units are mm.

template.basePdf: BlankPdf { width:number, height:number, padding:[t,r,b,l] } (units mm) | string(base64)/ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array existing PDF base
template.schemas: Schema[][] -- each outer element is a page; each inner element is { name:string, type:string, position:{x:number,y:number}, width:number, height:number, rotate?:number, content?:string } (coordinates/dimensions in mm, with position origin at top left)

schema.inputs: Record<string,any>[] -- each record is { [schema.name]: value }; record count equals the number of generated copies

when_to_use: 批量套版式的成品(同一张证书填 100 个名字、快递标签、门票、发票)用它——一份 JSON template 定每字段坐标+一份 inputs 数据即出像素对齐的 PDF;一次性自由排版走 pdf-lib/jspdf,改现有 PDF 表单走 pdf-lib。
why_valuable: 声明式模板(每字段 xywh 坐标+类型)与数据解耦,正合本项目「AI 拼 data → mount」模型;证书/工牌/标签这类固定版式套数据,原生 AI 用 jspdf 手算坐标既贵又对不齐。

data_in.note: template.schemas 是二维数组(页×字段);inputs 是记录数组,每条记录按 schema.name 映射到值,记录条数 = 产出份数。text/checkbox/radioGroup 类型 generator 内置无需 plugin;image/qrcode/barcode/table/line 等必须在调用时传 @pdfme/schemas 的 plugins,否则抛 'Plugin or renderer for type X not found'。单位 mm。

template.basePdf: BlankPdf { width:number, height:number, padding:[t,r,b,l] }(单位 mm) | string(base64)/ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array 现有 PDF 底版
template.schemas: Schema[][] —— 外层每元素是一页,内层每元素 { name:string, type:string, position:{x:number,y:number}, width:number, height:number, rotate?:number, content?:string }(坐标/尺寸单位 mm,position 原点左上)

schema.inputs: Record<string,any>[] —— 每条记录 { [schema.name]: 值 };记录条数 = 产出的套版份数

provides._note: headless-primitive:产出 Uint8Array;非渲染组件,无 carriers 矩阵。
provides.outputs: await generate(...) → Uint8Array;new Blob([pdf],{type:'application/pdf'}) 下载/预览。

api_surface.builtin_types: text / checkbox / radioGroup(+ acro 表单)由 generator 自动注入,纯这些类型可省 plugins
api_surface.extra_types: image / qrcode / barcode / table / line / rectangle / svg 需 plugins,取自 @pdfme/schemas

peer.note: 非纯 text 模板须显式传 plugins;从 @pdfme/schemas@6.1.12 import { text, image, table, line, rectangle, barcodes },qrcode 取 barcodes.qrcode。generator +esm 会自动子加载 @pdfme/schemas 与 @pdfme/pdf-lib(均 jsDelivr 200)。

boot.note: generate 是命名导出(export{ae as generate})。坐标/尺寸单位 mm,position 原点左上。纯 text 模板可省 plugins(generator 内置 Text/Checkbox/RadioGroup);含 image/qrcode/table/line/rectangle 等其它类型漏传 plugins 会抛未知类型错。产字节,无 shadow/head 足迹(schemas 里的 style 注入仅 UI/Designer 路径,generate 的 pdf-render 路径不触及,详见 isolation)。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr @pdfme/generator@6.1.12 +esm: exports 'export{ae as generate,xt as generateForm}' (no default) — boot imports { generate } correctly. dist/generate.d.ts: generate(props:GenerateProps)→Promise<Uint8Array>. @pdfme/common@6.1.12 schema.d.ts: Template={basePdf,schemas}; SchemaPageArray=z.array(z.array(Schema)) confirms 2D page×field array; Schema={name,type,position:{x,y},width,height,rotate?,content?}; GenerateProps.inputs=z.array(z.record(string,any)); BasePdf=BlankPdf{width,height,padding:[4-tuple]}|base64/ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array — schema fields match exactly. Plugin logic read from +esm getPlugins helper (ht=(t={})=>{...v(e,me)||(e.Text=Le)...}): auto-adds Text/Checkbox/RadioGroup/Acro* when absent; unmatched types resolve via findByType(d) and throw '[@pdfme/generator] Plugin or renderer for type ${d} not found.' — confirms peer @pdfme/schemas needed for image/qrcode/table/etc (boot passes them). Footprint: generator +esm has no document.head/<style/createElement/addEventListener. The imported @pdfme/schemas@6.1.12 +esm contains ONE guarded idempotent style injector (fn Ld, createElement('style')→document.head, id 'pdfme-air-datepicker-styles') — but it lives in the date plugin's UI render path (air-datepicker preview CSS: '--adp-*'), NOT the pdf render path; generate() invokes only each plugin's .pdf renderer (confirmed by the findByType(d).pdf error guard), so PDF generation injects nothing to head. Produces Uint8Array, renders nothing — shadow-safe; globalStyleInjection=no for the generate path.
